snacks_collection.speaker: Tiago Forte
snacks_collection.quote: Your brain is for having ideas, not holding them. We spend too much energy trying to remember things instead of using that energy to create.
snacks_collection.motivationalText: In the modern world, information is everywhere. If you try to memorize everything, you'll burn out. By creating a digital system to store your thoughts, you free up your mental bandwidth to actually solve problems and be creative.
snacks_collection.aphorism: Free your mind by trusting a system.

snacks_collection.speaker: Tiago Forte
snacks_collection.quote: A note is not just a record of the past; it is a building block for the future.
snacks_collection.motivationalText: Stop treating your notes as a graveyard of information. When you write something down, you are sending a gift to your future self.
snacks_collection.aphorism: Write it down to build it up.
